name: ascom
description: Install ASCOM Platform 7.0 RC4 and ASCOM Developer tools, enabling .NET 3.5 if needed. Pinned to mastw/mast00.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\ascom-verify.log'; $kNative = 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\ASCOM'; $kWow = 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\ASCOM'; $item = $null; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $kNative) { $item = Get-Item -LiteralPath $kNative } elseif (Test-Path -LiteralPath $kWow) { $item = Get-Item -LiteralPath $kWow }; if ($item) { $item | Format-List * | Out-File -FilePath $log; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\ascom-smoke.txt') -Value 'ascom_ok' } else { 'ASCOM registry key not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log; exit 1 }"
